new_init_pose.comment: Robot's pose in the CONVERTED map frame, assuming it starts at the same physical spot where the source SLAM session began (i.e. SLAM origin = (0,0,0) in the source frame). Paste the yaml_snippet into nav2_params.yaml's init_pose field.

notes: Both 2D map and 3D PCD are transformed by the same yaw + xy rigid motion.
The .pgm image pixels are unchanged; the map.yaml `origin` field is updated.
Each PCD point becomes p' = Rz(dyaw) * p + (dx, dy, 0).
If the robot now starts somewhere else, recompute init_pose accordingly,
or use RViz '2D Pose Estimate' to seed GICP at runtime.
